Navbar.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like to inquire about information or a quote for your services.

Hero.description: Experts in Adventure Tourism, Corporate Events, and Industrial Rope Access. Certified safety, passion for the limit.
Hero.primaryCta: GET A QUOTE FOR EVENT / TRIP
Hero.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I'm interested in getting a quote for an adventure experience or event.

LegacyAuthority.heading: 20 Years Creating Limit-Defying Experiences
LegacyAuthority.subheading: We're stepping into a new era by strengthening our legacy. We combine a passion for outdoor adventure with the technical rigor and safety that define us.

years.title: Years of History
years.desc: Designing rigging, corporate events, and expeditions across the region.

games.title: Team Integration Challenges
games.desc: Teamwork dynamics and custom adventure challenges.

competitions.title: High-Altitude Competitions
competitions.desc: Active participation in national and international rope access, arborism, and rescue competitions.

safety.title: Guaranteed Safety
safety.desc: Strict standards and certified equipment for vertical work, arborism, and extreme events.

banner.title: World-Class Technical Experience
banner.description: Our instructors and technicians have been tested in national and international rope access, arborism, and rescue competitions (such as Petzl Rope Trip), ensuring every rigging setup, industrial project, and adventure expedition is flawless.

AdventureServices.heading: Experiences and Infrastructure at the Limit
AdventureServices.subheading: From pure adrenaline day trips to multi-day adventure routes and certified infrastructure engineering with maximum safety.
AdventureServices.ctaCard: Consult options and get a quote
AdventureServices.whatsappPrefix: Hello Alta Cima, I would like to request information about

daytrip.title: Adventure Day Trips
daytrip.desc: Choose your one-day challenge: from rock climbing and technical hiking to the thrill of waterfall rappelling (canyoning). Guided outings with certified equipment and personalized attention.

expeditions.title: Adventure Expeditions
expeditions.desc: Multi-day treks and routes designed to your specifications. Explore canyons, torrents, and unconventional landscapes with field logistics, campsites, and specialized guides.

construction.title: Adventure Park Construction
construction.desc: Engineering, design, and safe installation of climbing walls, canopy lines, ziplines, suspension bridges, and high-rope courses under international standards.

B2BEvents.heading: High-Impact Challenges for Teams
B2BEvents.subheading: We design and execute temporary setups, team-working dynamics, and corporate adventure challenges with maximum safety and technical rigor.
B2BEvents.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I'm interested in a quote for a corporate activity / B2B event.

statCard.title: Tailored Solutions
statCard.subtitle: For Companies & Brands
statCard.desc: We adapt vertical setups, rope bridges, and group challenges at any location or convention center.

rigging.title: Temporary Setups & Rigging
rigging.desc: Mobile rope structures, temporary ziplines, and climbing towers designed for brand events and corporate activations.

teambuilding.title: Integration Games (+80)
teambuilding.desc: Over 80 leadership, communication, and trust-building exercises under pressure, led by experienced facilitators.

custom.title: Logistics & 100% Safety
custom.desc: Comprehensive risk management, assistance policies, and certified staff to ensure a seamless experience.

features.item3: Pre-site assessment of terrain and risks
features.item4: Flexible logistics for indoor or outdoor venues

IndustrialRope.heading: Rope Access & High-Altitude Solutions
IndustrialRope.subheading: We bring our competition-level technical rigor (Petzl / ITRA) to the industrial and construction sectors with absolute precision.
IndustrialRope.whatsappIndustrialMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I need information about industrial high-altitude work services.
IndustrialRope.whatsappGearMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like to see the catalog of specialized clothing for working at height.

access.title: Difficult Access Work & Installations
access.desc: Technical interventions on complex structures, facades and high-altitude installations using advanced rope positioning techniques.

maintenance.title: Equipment: Sales, Inspection & Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Sale of specialized PPE, periodic inspection and certified maintenance of equipment for rope activities and vertical work.

consulting.title: Fixed Climbing Walls & Rigging
consulting.desc: Design and construction of fixed climbing walls, installation of temporary or permanent lifelines and assembly of rescue systems.

IndustrialRope.gearTitle: Specialized Clothing for Vertical Work & Adventure
IndustrialRope.gearDesc: We design and manufacture high-performance pants and hoodies tested in extreme conditions. Flexibility, abrasion resistance and ergonomics designed for harness use.

LeadForm.heading: Let's Talk About Your Next Project
LeadForm.subheading: Fill out the form and we'll direct you to WhatsApp with the information ready to request a quote.

placeholders.name: e.g. John Doe
placeholders.notes: Tell us about dates, number of people, location, or specific needs...

ImageGalleryCarousel.heading: Real Field Experiences
ImageGalleryCarousel.subheading: A visual showcase of our technical rigging, adventure expeditions, and corporate events.

Footer.brandDescription: Over 20 years defying heights. Experts in Adventure Tourism, Corporate Events, Industrial Rope Access, and Technical Gear.
Footer.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like more information about your services.
